_comment: LinkedIn post content templates for AI Employee Vault - Gold Tier

announcement.label: Announcement
announcement.description: New product, feature, or company news

thought_leadership.label: Thought Leadership

milestone.label: Milestone / Achievement
milestone.description: Celebrating a goal reached, anniversary, or win
templates:
{{milestone}} — and we couldn't have done it without {{acknowledgment}}.

When we started, {{origin_story}}.

Today, {{current_state}}.

Thank you to everyone who {{contribution}}. This is just the beginning.

{{timeframe}} ago, {{starting_point}}. Today: {{milestone}}.

The path wasn't linear. {{challenge}} tested us, but {{how_we_overcame}}.

Looking forward to {{next_chapter}}.

tip.label: Quick Tip / How-To
tip.description: Educational content, practical advice, how-to guides

event.label: Event Promotion
event.description: Webinar, conference, meetup, product launch event

hiring.label: Hiring / Recruitment
hiring.description: Job openings and team growth announcements
templates:
Hiring a {{role}} who loves {{passion}}.

You'll be working on {{project_description}}.

Ideal candidate: {{ideal_profile}}

Apply: {{link}} or DM me directly.

visibility_options.PUBLIC: Visible to everyone on LinkedIn and the web
visibility_options.LOGGED_IN: Visible to all LinkedIn members (signed in)

best_practices: Start with a hook — first 2 lines must earn the 'see more' click
Use white space and line breaks generously for readability
End with a question or CTA to drive engagement
Post between 8–10am or 12–1pm on Tue/Wed/Thu for best reach
Native video gets 3x more reach than YouTube links
Tag only people who are genuinely relevant
Respond to every comment within the first hour
